title: teucrium mesanidum
intro: Teucrium mesanidum, also known as Greek germander, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including liver and gallbladder disorders, due to its cholagogue effects, which stimulate the release of bile. Teucrium mesanidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal preparations, such as capsules or topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential liver toxicity.
